name: RSA Insurance Group plc
description: RSA Insurance Group Limited, formerly known as RSA Insurance Group plc, is a prominent British multinational general insurance company headquartered in London, England. With a history dating back to 1706, the firm provides a wide range of commercial and specialty insurance products, including motor, marine, liability, and property coverage. RSA operates extensively across the United Kingdom, Ireland, Scandinavia, and Canada, serving customers through a network of brokers, partners, and direct channels. Now a subsidiary of Intact Financial Corporation, the company remains a significant player in the global insurance market, delivering expert risk solutions to businesses worldwide.
